title: SPY-relative leader follow-through add-on cap
summary: Lifted only the first follow-through add-on cap for accepted SPY-relative leaders to 60%.
decision: Accepted after three-window Gate 4: aggregate PnL +6.28%, aggregate EV +7.33%, EV up in 3/3 windows.
next_step: Monitor concentration and do not retry higher nearby caps without forward or event/news evidence.
